components.buttons: pill-shaped (rounded-full), subtle glow effect on hover, active state shrinks slightly. Primary button uses gold gradient or solid gold.
components.cards: glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-lg
components.modals: Shadcn dialogs customized with dark glassmorphism and Playfair Display headings
components.forms: Shadcn inputs with transparent backgrounds, bottom border only or fully rounded with subtle inner shadow.

motion.cinematic_reveal: curtain parting animation on celebration load, scaling up the main content with a subtle bounce

images.description: Magical smartphone glow for landing page hero section
Premium celebration abstract background for creator dashboard or landing page sections
Romantic roses for anniversary theme thumbnail
Elegant cake for the interactive blowing candles feature

specific_features.creator_wizard: A multi-step bento card layout with a progress indicator at the top. Use framer-motion AnimatePresence to slide between steps.
specific_features.theme_selector: Grid of 12 cards with glassmorphism hover states. When selected, a glowing border (tracing beam) appears around the card.
specific_features.celebration_experience: Full-screen fixed layout. Starts with a dark preloader and countdown, then a curtain reveal. Uses TSParticles for confetti/fireworks.
specific_features.voice_message: Audio player with a visual waveform (can be faked with CSS animations if real waveform is too complex, but must look premium).
specific_features.easter_egg: Hidden tap zone on the main celebration title. 3 rapid taps trigger a special full-screen golden confetti burst.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Playfair Display for all major headings and Outfit for body text.
Implement the creator dashboard using Shadcn UI components but heavily customized with the dark jewel theme (Midnight Blue backgrounds, glassmorphic cards).
For the celebration experience, rely on framer-motion for heavy cinematic reveals (curtain opening, zoom-ins).
Use TSParticles or react-confetti for the interactive celebration effects.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Use the provided image URLs exclusively for all visual assets. Do not use placeholder services.
The 12 themes should modify the CSS variables (primary color, background effects) of the celebration experience dynamically.
